channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Pregnancy & Reproductive Health
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Pregnancy & Reproductive Health

item.title: Maternal influenza infection during pregnancy and subsequent risk of inflammatory bowel diseases in offspring: a nationwide birth cohort study in South Korea.
Repeated opioid use during pregnancy in women with inflammatory bowel disease: prevalence and impact on birth outcomes in Denmark.
item.description: Journal of Crohn's & colitis - In women with IBD, there are few options to treat pain during pregnancy and prescribers sometimes rely on opioids. We investigated the prevalence of repeated opioid use during the pregnancy period ...

item.title: Shifting Towards Empagliflozin First-Line Therapy in Glycogen Storage Disease Type Ib: A Nationwide Real-World Study.
item.description: Journal of inherited metabolic disease - Neutrophil dysfunction and neutropenia are burdensome findings in glycogen storage disease type Ib (GSDIb). Treatment with granulocyte-colony stimulating factor (G-CSF) often corrects neutropenia b...
